Text.Page:
Got the materials for you, if you're willing to provide the skill.

Craft clothworker's tunics and come back for inspection.

Nice, very nice. You do fine work, .

But to find out if they're really ready for the field, deliver the tunics to Prefect Paka in Popolion. He knows armor.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
Very nice! Soft, comfy, and easy to flee in. Perfect!
